detail: All 43 files under runs/blackjack/ map to authorized writer paths per file_schemas.md permission table. Inline-dispatch Coordinator's Overseer/Builder writes are within authorized inline behavior.

Scanned output/integration/ for all 15 ledger out_of_scope categories (multiplayer, payments, accounts, persistence, leaderboards/social, backend/API, AI difficulty, insurance/surrender/sidebets, sound/music, localization). Three keyword hits all false positives: 'Public API' (code comment, not backend call); 'Hard reset' (bankroll reset comment, not difficulty); 'translateY' (CSS transform, not i18n). No real out-of-scope content present.
All 12 canonical files validated. ledger-v1.json, sections-v1.json, 3 contracts, dag.json, 5 section state files, manifest.json all contain required fields and parse as valid JSON.

All 5 DAG sections (rules-engine, betting-and-bankroll, ui-render, controller-and-shell, edge-case-testing) have state files with status=verified. All 5 have at least one builder output dir. Integrator pseudo-node is verified.
